NLPService.docstring: Service for natural language processing operations.

__init__.docstring:
Initialize NLP service with models.
        
        Args:
            use_local_only (bool): If True, only use local models and never download.
                                   Default is True to prevent network issues.

extract_tags.docstring: Extract tags from text using multiple strategies.

extract_technical_terms.docstring: Extract technical terminology using regex patterns.
